command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; tasks=[d for d in Path('artifacts/tasks').iterdir() if d.is_dir() and (d/'task_state.json').exists()]; states={}; [states.update({json.loads((t/'task_state.json').read_text()).get('status','unknown'): states.get(json.loads((t/'task_state.json').read_text()).get('status','unknown'),0)+1}) for t in tasks]; print(json.dumps(states))" > artifacts/tasks/b21_health_report_daily/output/task_states.txt
